sentences.target: Ich tröste das Opfer am Straßenrand.

translations.de: Ich tröste das Opfer am Straßenrand.
translations.en: I comfort the victim at the roadside.
translations.es: Consuelo a la víctima al borde de la carretera.
translations.fr: Je réconforte la victime sur le bas-côté.
translations.it: Conforto la vittima sul ciglio della strada.
translations.pt: Conforto a vítima à beira da estrada.
translations.he: אני מרגיע את הנפגע בצד הכביש.
translations.vi: Tôi an ủi nạn nhân ở ven đường.
translations.nl: Ik troost het slachtoffer aan de kant van de weg.
translations.hu: Megvigasztalom a sérültet az út szélén.
translations.hi: मैं सड़क किनारे घायल व्यक्ति को दिलासा देता हूँ.
translations.el: Παρηγορώ τον τραυματία στην άκρη του δρόμου.
translations.nb: Jeg trøster den skadde ved veikanten.
translations.id: Saya menghibur korban di pinggir jalan.
translations.sv: Jag tröstar den skadade vid vägkanten.
translations.ro: Consol persoana rănită la marginea drumului.
translations.da: Jeg trøster den tilskadekomne i vejkanten.
translations.ja: 路肩でけが人を慰める。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; takes a direct accusative object and allows a locative PP.
Definite article, accusative neuter singular; determiner of 'Opfer'.
Common noun, neuter accusative singular; direct object (patient) of 'tröste'.
Contraction of preposition + article; governs dative; introduces a locative PP.
Common noun, masculine dative singular as object of 'an'; head of the locative PP.

sentences.target: Die Polizei befragt das Opfer nach dem Überfall.
sentences.reading: /diː poliˈt͡saɪ̯ bəˈfʁaːkt das ˈɔpfɐ naːx deːm ˈyːbɐfal/

translations.de: Die Polizei befragt das Opfer nach dem Überfall.
translations.ipa: /diː poliˈt͡saɪ̯ bəˈfʁaːkt das ˈɔpfɐ naːx deːm ˈyːbɐfal/
translations.en: The police interview the victim after the robbery.
translations.es: La policía entrevista a la víctima después del robo.
translations.fr: La police interroge la victime après le braquage.
translations.it: La polizia interroga la vittima dopo la rapina.
translations.ko: 경찰이 강도 사건 후 피해자를 조사한다.
translations.zh-Hans: 警方在抢劫后询问受害者。
translations.yue: 警方在劫案後詢問受害人。
translations.pt: A polícia entrevista a vítima após o roubo.
translations.he: המשטרה מתשאלת את הקורבן אחרי השוד.
translations.tr: Polis soygundan sonra mağdurun ifadesini alıyor.
translations.vi: Cảnh sát phỏng vấn nạn nhân sau vụ cướp.
translations.nl: De politie spreekt met het slachtoffer na de overval.
translations.hu: A rendőrség kihallgatja az áldozatot a rablás után.
translations.hi: डकैती के बाद पुलिस पीड़ित से पूछताछ करती है.
translations.el: Η αστυνομία ανακρίνει το θύμα μετά τη ληστεία.
translations.ro: Poliția ia declarații victimei după jaf.
translations.ja: 警察は強盗の後で被害者に事情を聞く。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular; determiner of 'Polizei'.
Common noun, feminine nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes a direct accusative object; PP 'nach dem Überfall' functions as an adverbial (here likely temporal 'after the robbery').
Definite article, accusative neuter singular; determiner of 'Opfer'.
Common noun, neuter accusative singular; direct object of 'befragt'.
Preposition governing dative; introduces a temporal PP.
Definite article, dative masculine singular; determiner of 'Überfall'.
Common noun, masculine dative singular; head of the PP with 'nach'.

sentences.target: Die Sanitäter versorgen das Opfer vorsichtig.

translations.de: Die Sanitäter versorgen das Opfer vorsichtig.
translations.en: The paramedics treat the victim carefully.
translations.es: Los paramédicos atienden al herido con cuidado.
translations.fr: Les ambulanciers soignent le blessé avec précaution.
translations.it: I paramedici curano il ferito con attenzione.
translations.zh-Hans: 急救人员小心地救治伤者。
translations.yue: 救護員小心地救治傷者。
translations.pt: Os paramédicos atendem o ferido com cuidado.
translations.vi: Nhân viên cấp cứu chăm sóc người bị thương một cách cẩn thận.
translations.hu: A mentősök óvatosan ellátják a sérültet.
translations.hi: पैरामेडिक घायल व्यक्ति का सावधानी से इलाज करते हैं.
translations.el: Οι διασώστες περιθάλπουν τον τραυματία με προσοχή.
translations.id: Petugas medis merawat orang yang terluka dengan hati-hati.
translations.ro: Paramedicii tratează persoana rănită cu grijă.
translations.ja: 救急隊員がけが人を慎重に手当てする。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative plural; determiner of 'Sanitäter'.
Common noun, plural; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person plural; transitive, selecting an accusative object.
Definite article, accusative neuter singular; determiner of 'Opfer'.
Common noun, neuter accusative singular; direct object (patient) of 'versorgen'.
Adverb of manner modifying 'versorgen'.

sentences.target: Im Krankenhaus wartet das Opfer auf eine Untersuchung.
sentences.reading: /ɪm ˈkʁaŋkənhaʊ̯s ˈvaʁtət das ˈɔpfɐ aʊ̯f ˈaɪ̯nə ʊntɐˈzuːxʊŋ/

translations.de: Im Krankenhaus wartet das Opfer auf eine Untersuchung.
translations.ipa: /ɪm ˈkʁaŋkənhaʊ̯s ˈvaʁtət das ˈɔpfɐ aʊ̯f ˈaɪ̯nə ʊntɐˈzuːxʊŋ/
translations.en: At the hospital, the victim waits for an exam.
translations.es: En el hospital, el paciente espera una revisión.
translations.fr: À l’hôpital, le patient attend un examen.
translations.it: In ospedale, il paziente aspetta una visita.
translations.pt: No hospital, o paciente espera por um exame.
translations.vi: Tại bệnh viện, bệnh nhân đang chờ khám.
translations.nl: In het ziekenhuis wacht de patiënt op een onderzoek.
translations.uk: У лікарні пацієнт чекає на обстеження.
translations.hu: A kórházban a beteg vizsgálatra vár.
translations.hi: अस्पताल में मरीज जांच का इंतज़ार कर रहा है.
translations.pl: W szpitalu pacjent czeka na badanie.
translations.el: Στο νοσοκομείο ο ασθενής περιμένει για εξέταση.
translations.nb: På sykehuset venter pasienten på en undersøkelse.
translations.id: Di rumah sakit, pasien menunggu pemeriksaan.
translations.sv: På sjukhuset väntar patienten på en undersökning.
translations.ro: La spital, pacientul așteaptă un consult.
translations.cs: V nemocnici pacient čeká na vyšetření.
translations.da: På hospitalet venter patienten på en undersøkelse.
translations.ja: 病院で患者が検査を待っている。

Die Sanitäter versorgen das Opfer vorsichtig.
Im Krankenhaus wartet das Opfer auf eine Untersuchung.

La policía entrevista a la víctima después del robo.
Los paramédicos atienden al herido con cuidado.
En el hospital, el paciente espera una revisión.

La police interroge la victime après le braquage.

La polizia interroga la vittima dopo la rapina.
I paramedici curano il ferito con attenzione.
In ospedale, il paziente aspetta una visita.

Στο νοσοκομείο ο ασθενής περιμένει για εξέταση.

Petugas medis merawat orang yang terluka dengan hati-hati.
